ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Developed, Developing) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Specific country within the region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., continent, subregion) */,
  "total_population" REAL /* Total population of the region (in thousands) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sex" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex (e.g., Both sexes) */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the sex (e.g., B) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sex category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Name of the year (e.g., 1990) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year (e.g., 2023-2024) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "migrant_stock" (
  "migrant_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each migrant stock record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sex */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "migrant_stock_at_mid_year" INTEGER /* International migrant stock at mid-year */,
  "total_population_at_mid_year" REAL /* Total population at mid-year (in thousands) */,
  "migrant_stock_as_percentage_of_total_population" REAL /* International migrant stock as percentage of total population */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country of origin of the migrants */,
  "country_of_destination" TEXT /* Country of destination of the migrants */,
  "migration_type" TEXT /* Type of migration (e.g., voluntary, forced, economic) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., census, survey) */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Data quality score (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("migrant_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migrant_stock_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migrant_stock_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migrant_stock_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sex ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "refugee_stock" (
  "refugee_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each refugee stock record */,
  "migrant_stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the migrant stock record */,
  "estimated_refugee_stock_at_mid_year" INTEGER /* Estimated refugee stock at mid-year */,
  "refugees_as_percentage_of_international_migrant_stock" REAL /* Refugees as a percentage of the international migrant stock */,
  "reason_for_displacement" TEXT /* Reason for displacement (e.g., conflict, natural disaster) */,
  "duration_of_displacement" TEXT /* Duration of displacement */,
  "resettlement_status" TEXT /* Resettlement status (e.g., pending, resettled, returned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("refugee_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refugee_stock_migrant_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("migrant_stock_id") REFERENCES migrant_stock ("migrant_stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, researcher) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "migrant_stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the migrant stock record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the migrant stock record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_migrant_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("migrant_stock_id") REFERENCES migrant_stock ("migrant_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
